title: ANC - changes are present after closing/opening the ANC tab
scenario: ANC settings do not persist when closing and reopening the ANC tab on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on ANC (Active Noise Cancellation) tab
Change ANC settings (e.g., adjust ANC level or toggle ANC modes)
Close the ANC tab by navigating back to Audio Settings or Home screen
Reopen the ANC tab by navigating again: Device Settings → Audio Settings → ANC
expected: Previously set ANC values should be retained and displayed when the ANC tab is reopened.
